message:
feat(deps): update reqwest TLS feature name and fix fastembed mutability

Rename reqwest feature from deprecated 'rustls-tls' to 'rustls' to align
with reqwest's current feature naming. This also updates Cargo.lock with
downstream dependency bumps (windows-sys 0.52→0.59, thiserror 1.0→2.0).

Fix fastembed embedder and reranker MutexGuard bindings to use 'let mut'
instead of 'let', required by the updated fastembed API which now needs
mutable access to the model during embed/rerank operations. Affected
methods: FastEmbedder::embed(), FastEmbedder::embed_batch(), and
FastEmbedReranker::rerank().

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
